title: ochna ciliata
intro: Ochna ciliata, also known as the bird's eye or Mickey mouse plant, is a small evergreen shrub native to South Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ochna ciliata include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, often in combination with other plants to enhance its medicinal effects.
